name: Collin Walcott
abstract: Collin Walcott (April 24, 1945 – November 8, 1984) was an American sitar and tabla player in the jazz and world music genres.

concerts.label: Oregon, with Sun Ra, Piano, and the Carla Bley Band
Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: Memories of the Future 40 Years Later - An Evening with Oregon and the Paul Winter Consort

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Collin Walcott is listed among the musicians present in the studio ('There is Herbie, McLaughlin, Chick, Billy Hart, [Jack] DeJohnette, Larry Young, Badal [Roy], Collin Walcott, Don Alias...'), but the interviewee (Dave Liebman) does not describe any personal interaction, collaboration, or relations
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
